name: Gregg Turkington
blurb: He has released numerous Neil Hamburger albums on the Drag City label since the 1990s and co-stars as a fictionalized version of himself in the web series On Cinema with Tim Heidecker.
bio: Gregg Turkington is an American comedian, actor, and musician best known for creating Neil Hamburger, a misanthropic anti-comedian persona built on intentionally bad jokes, throat-clearing, and a confrontational lounge-act delivery. He has released numerous Neil Hamburger albums on the Drag City label since the 1990s and co-stars as a fictionalized version of himself in the web series On Cinema with Tim Heidecker. His work is a touchstone of anti-comedy.

timeline.ev: Born in Darwin, Australia, to American parents
Drag City releases the album Americas Funnyman
On Cinema begins with Tim Heidecker

accolades: Creator of the cult anti-comedy persona Neil Hamburger
Long catalog of comedy albums on the Drag City label

movies_tv.t: What We Do in the Shadows

bits.sp: On Cinema 3rd Annual Live Oscar Special
